news.title: Apple’s Vision Pro hardware chief defects to OpenAI
news.summary: Apple Inc. is losing a pillar of its spatial computing ambitions to OpenAI. Paul Meade, the Vice President overseeing the Vision Pro headset and Apple’s upcoming smart glasses, is departing the tech giant. Meade will exit Apple by next week to spearhead OpenAI’s burgeoning hardware division, according to a Bloomberg report.
